title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Run large language models from any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, browsers, and edge runtimes.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs, embeddings, and chat models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI client for Ollama. No API keys needed, runs entirely in your browser.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and Micronaut integration.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for VS Code.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation template using Ollama embeddings and ChromaDB.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Declarative Ollama service for NixOS with automatic model caching.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU nodes.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models in pipelines for QA and summarization.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with Blazor sample and minimal API examples.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat client built with Go and Bubble Tea, supports multi-session history.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local LLM assistance to your notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio and native TLS support.

title: ollama-mlflow
summary: MLflow example showing how to log and benchmark Ollama models with built-in metrics.

title: ollama-modal
summary: Run Ollama on Modal’s serverless GPUs with scale-to-zero and persistent volume caching.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model using slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama command to converse with local LLMs in any channel.
